intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把不同维度的比较词和最后的自嘲笑点读顺。

sentences.text: Joe Sanders has the most beautiful garden in our town.
sentences.focus_zh: the most beautiful 要读出“全镇最突出”的感觉。

sentences.text: Nearly everybody enters for 'The Nicest Garden Competition' each year, but Joe wins every time.
sentences.focus_zh: enters for 是报名参加，competition 和 wins every time 是比赛线索。

sentences.text: Bill Frith's garden is larger than Joe's.
sentences.focus_zh: larger than 是大小比较，than 后面的 Joe's 要轻轻收住。

sentences.text: Bill works harder than Joe and grows more flowers and vegetables, but Joe's garden is more interesting.
sentences.focus_zh: but 前是努力和数量，but 后转到 more interesting。

sentences.text: He has made neat paths and has built a wooden bridge over a pool.
sentences.focus_zh: neat paths、wooden bridge、pool 是乔的设计细节。

sentences.text: I like gardens too, but I do not like hard work.
sentences.focus_zh: but 后面是叙述者诚实又好笑的自我介绍。

sentences.text: Every year I enter for the garden competition too, and I always win a little prize for the worst garden in the town!
sentences.focus_zh: always win 先像好消息，the worst garden 是最后的笑点。
